# Vendored browser dependencies

## Supabase JavaScript client

- Version: `2.110.7`
- Runtime file: `supabase-2.110.7.min.js`
- Source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2.110.7/dist/umd/supabase.min.js`
- SHA-256: `61010a711aa585660cc5132babd6da57fd89a973b845412c8916f8573a455c2b`
- License: MIT; see `supabase-js-LICENSE.txt`

The pinned bundle is committed so the application and its offline shell do not execute code from a third-party origin at runtime.
